paragraphs.intro: Hi there! I'm Sergio Perez, an Android developer and technology enthusiast from South America. I'm currently studying Computer Science while building projects that explore the intersection of software, robotics, and embedded systems.
paragraphs.background: Over the past few years I've participated in several robotics competitions, earning awards in some of them. I also enjoy developing experimental projects, from intelligent fire-detection vehicles powered by ESP32 to Android applications that connect hardware, data, and users.
paragraphs.closing: My goal is to create technology that feels like a natural extension of human creativity—where art, engineering, and modern digital tools work together to solve real problems. Feel free to explore my work on {{githubLink}}, try some of my {{appsLink}}, or simply take a look around the website.

projects.title: Recent highlights
projects.description: Here you can see some of my recent projects. Look at my project management on {{githubLink}} to see what I'm currently working on.
